tweets.text:
“The United States has all of the cards, Iran has NONE.”

That’s when Stephen Miller just drew the line in the sand with the Iranian regime.

MILLER: “President Trump is a man of peace, President Trump wants peace.”

“But President Trump has also been clear: America will not be trifled with, America will not be bullied, and America never, EVER, be threatened by a nuclear armed Iran.”

“Not now. NOT EVER.”

“And he has made that CRYSTAL clear, painfully clear to the Iranians.”

tweets.text:
“Our wealth, our treasure, our power has been bled from us for 50 years.”

In under a minute, Stephen Miller lays out how President Trump has RESET the global order to secure another century of American dominance.

This is the bigger story behind everything unfolding right now.

MILLER: “We won World War II and then we decided we would going to get rid of the Department of War, we were going to get the Department of Defense and we were going to have a politically correct foreign policy.”

“We sent away our jobs, we sent away our wealth, we sent away our industry and we gave other countries a chance to compete against us.”

“President trump has used trade policy, energy policy, manufacturing policy, and yes, hard military power, to ensure another century of American dominance.”

“What’s important for your viewers to understand is our quality of life that we have in America is purchased by American strength.”

“The reason our GDP per capita blows every other nation out of the water is because of American strength”.

“That’s why we are able to enjoy the life we enjoy. But it was threatened as never before until President Trump said we are going to be a proud powerful mighty nation again.”

“And that’s what you are seeing right now play out in the Middle East.”
